languages.text: Джай часто навещала Эоганна, проводя время в философских беседах и обсуждении любопытных ксеносских находок, и с годами необычная дружба Хладной Торговки и манипулуса лишь крепчала. Однажды, после очередного визита в лабораторию, Джай вышла из нее без своего шейного аугмента — и впервые за много лет сделала вдох полной грудью с воссозданными органическими легкими.

Jae visited Eogunn often, spending time engaging in philosophical conversations and discussing fascinating xenos finds, and over the years, the unusual friendship between the Cold Trader and the Manipulus only grew stronger. One day, at the end of yet another visit, Jae left the laboratory without her neck augment — and for the first time in many years, she drew a deep breath into reconstructed organic lungs.
languages.original_text: Джай часто навещала Эоганна, проводя время в философских беседах и обсуждении любопытных ксеносских находок, и с годами необычная дружба Хладной Торговки и манипулуса лишь крепчала. Однажды, после очередного визита в лабораторию, Джай вышла из нее без своего шейного аугмента — и впервые за много лет сделала вдох полной грудью с воссозданными органическими легкими.

One day, at the end of yet another visit, Jae left the laboratory without her neck augment — and for the first time in many years, she drew a deep breath into reconstructed organic lungs.

One day, at the end of yet another visit, Jae left the laboratory without her neck augment — and for the first time in many years, she drew a deep breath into reconstructed organic lungs.

Jae visited Eogunn often, spending time engaging in philosophical conversations and discussing fascinating xenos finds, and over the years, the unusual friendship between the Cold Trader and the Manipulus only grew stronger. One day, at the end of yet another visit, Jae left the laboratory without her neck augment — and for the first time in many years, she drew a deep breath into reconstructed organic lungs.

languages.text: 婕伊经常去拜访伊奥贡，与他畅谈哲学，探讨各种引人入胜的异形遗物。随着岁月流逝，这位冷市商人与操纵者之间不同寻常的友谊愈发深厚。有一天，在又一次拜访结束后，婕伊将自己的颈部植入物留在实验室便离开了——多年来，她第一次用重建后的有机肺部深深吸了一口气。
languages.original_text: Jae visited Eogunn often, spending time engaging in philosophical conversations and discussing fascinating xenos finds, and over the years, the unusual friendship between the Cold Trader and the Manipulus only grew stronger. One day, at the end of yet another visit, Jae left the laboratory without her neck augment — and for the first time in many years, she drew a deep breath into reconstructed organic lungs.

traits.locale_text: 婕伊经常去拜访伊奥贡，与他畅谈哲学，探讨各种引人入胜的异形遗物。随着岁月流逝，这位冷市商人与操纵者之间不同寻常的友谊愈发深厚。有一天，在又一次拜访结束后，婕伊将自己的颈部植入物留在实验室便离开了——多年来，她第一次用重建后的有机肺部深深吸了一口气。

languages.text: Jae besuchte Eogunn häufig zu philosophischen Disputen und Gesprächen über faszinierende Xenosfunde, und im Laufe der Jahre wurde die ungewöhnliche Freundschaft der Kalthändlerin mit dem Manipulus noch inniger. Eines Tages verließ Jae das Labor nach einem Besuch ohne ihre Nackenaugmentation ... und atmete zum ersten Mal seit vielen Jahren mit rekonstruierten organischen Lungen.
languages.original_text: Jae visited Eogunn often, spending time engaging in philosophical conversations and discussing fascinating xenos finds, and over the years, the unusual friendship between the Cold Trader and the Manipulus only grew stronger. One day, at the end of yet another visit, Jae left the laboratory without her neck augment — and for the first time in many years, she drew a deep breath into reconstructed organic lungs.

traits.locale_text: Jae besuchte Eogunn häufig zu philosophischen Disputen und Gesprächen über faszinierende Xenosfunde, und im Laufe der Jahre wurde die ungewöhnliche Freundschaft der Kalthändlerin mit dem Manipulus noch inniger. Eines Tages verließ Jae das Labor nach einem Besuch ohne ihre Nackenaugmentation ... und atmete zum ersten Mal seit vielen Jahren mit rekonstruierten organischen Lungen.

languages.text: Jae; Eogunn'u sık sık ziyaret etti, felsefi sohbetler yaparak ve büyüleyici zeno buluntularını tartışarak zaman geçirdi ve yıllar içinde Soğuk Tacir ile Manipülus arasındaki tuhaf dostluk daha da güçlendi. Bir gün bir ziyaretin sonunda Jae, boyun ogmenti olmadan laboratuvardan ayrıldı. Uzun yıllar sonra ilk kez yeniden yapılandırılmış organik akciğerlerine derin bir nefes çekti.
languages.original_text: Jae visited Eogunn often, spending time engaging in philosophical conversations and discussing fascinating xenos finds, and over the years, the unusual friendship between the Cold Trader and the Manipulus only grew stronger. One day, at the end of yet another visit, Jae left the laboratory without her neck augment — and for the first time in many years, she drew a deep breath into reconstructed organic lungs.

traits.locale_text: Jae; Eogunn'u sık sık ziyaret etti, felsefi sohbetler yaparak ve büyüleyici zeno buluntularını tartışarak zaman geçirdi ve yıllar içinde Soğuk Tacir ile Manipülus arasındaki tuhaf dostluk daha da güçlendi. Bir gün bir ziyaretin sonunda Jae, boyun ogmenti olmadan laboratuvardan ayrıldı. Uzun yıllar sonra ilk kez yeniden yapılandırılmış organik akciğerlerine derin bir nefes çekti.

languages.text: Jae visitó a Eogunn con frecuencia, manteniendo debates filosóficos y discutiendo fascinantes hallazgos sobre los xenos, y con el paso de los años creció la insólita amistad entre la comerciante fría y el manipulus. Un día, al final de una de sus visitas, Jae se marchó del laboratorio sin el aumento de su cuello... y por primera vez en muchos años, respiró con un par de pulmones orgánicos reconstruidos.
languages.original_text: Jae visited Eogunn often, spending time engaging in philosophical conversations and discussing fascinating xenos finds, and over the years, the unusual friendship between the Cold Trader and the Manipulus only grew stronger. One day, at the end of yet another visit, Jae left the laboratory without her neck augment — and for the first time in many years, she drew a deep breath into reconstructed organic lungs.

traits.locale_text: Jae visitó a Eogunn con frecuencia, manteniendo debates filosóficos y discutiendo fascinantes hallazgos sobre los xenos, y con el paso de los años creció la insólita amistad entre la comerciante fría y el manipulus. Un día, al final de una de sus visitas, Jae se marchó del laboratorio sin el aumento de su cuello... y por primera vez en muchos años, respiró con un par de pulmones orgánicos reconstruidos.

languages.text: Jae rendit souvent visite à Eogunn, passant du temps à discuter philosophie et trouvailles xénos fascinantes, et au fil des années, une amitié improbable grandit entre l'adepte du Commerce Froid et le manipulus. Puis un jour, après une nième visite, Jae quitta le laboratoire sans son augmentation de cou et pour la première fois depuis des années, elle put prendre une profonde inspiration dans des poumons organiques entièrement reconstitués.
languages.original_text: Jae visited Eogunn often, spending time engaging in philosophical conversations and discussing fascinating xenos finds, and over the years, the unusual friendship between the Cold Trader and the Manipulus only grew stronger. One day, at the end of yet another visit, Jae left the laboratory without her neck augment — and for the first time in many years, she drew a deep breath into reconstructed organic lungs.

traits.locale_text: Jae rendit souvent visite à Eogunn, passant du temps à discuter philosophie et trouvailles xénos fascinantes, et au fil des années, une amitié improbable grandit entre l'adepte du Commerce Froid et le manipulus. Puis un jour, après une nième visite, Jae quitta le laboratoire sans son augmentation de cou et pour la première fois depuis des années, elle put prendre une profonde inspiration dans des poumons organiques entièrement reconstitués.

languages.text: ジェイは足繁くエオガンのもとを訪れ、哲学的な会話に時を費やし、魅惑的な異種族の発見について語り合った。そして年月を経るにつれ、コールド・トレーダーとマニピュラスの間の風変わりな友情はいっそう深まっていった。ある日、またしても訪問の終わりに、ジェイは首の強化器を外したまま研究室を後にし――幾年もの中で初めて、再建された有機の肺いっぱいに深く息を吸い込んだのである。
languages.original_text: Jae visited Eogunn often, spending time engaging in philosophical conversations and discussing fascinating xenos finds, and over the years, the unusual friendship between the Cold Trader and the Manipulus only grew stronger. One day, at the end of yet another visit, Jae left the laboratory without her neck augment — and for the first time in many years, she drew a deep breath into reconstructed organic lungs.
